text.autoconfig.advancedfletchingtable.o: Enable Craft Tab
Show the Craft tab in the fletching table.
Enable Untint Tab
Show the Untint tab in the fletching table.
Enable Customize Tab
Show the Customize tab in the fletching table.
Enable Uncrafting
Allow placing a plain arrow in the = slot to recover feather, stick and flint.
Crafted Arrow Count
How many arrows are produced from feather + stick + flint.
Spectral Arrow Count
How many spectral arrows are produced from any spectral recipe.
Crafting Table Arrow Count
How many arrows the vanilla crafting table produces (fletching table is separate).
Require Glowstone for Color
Whether glowstone dust is required in the Customize tab to apply a color.
Preserve Color — Crafting Table
Keep TrailColor when tipping colored arrows in a vanilla crafting table.
Preserve Color — Advanced Cauldron
Keep trail color when tipping colored arrows in a brewing cauldron.
Requires the Advanced Cauldron mod. Has no effect without it.
